title: Denied Claims Refresh With Supabase Authority, Monday Resolution, And Cache Rebuild
summary: Verified strategy for refreshing denied claims from current report files: parse and scope official denial evidence, dry-run against Supabase and Monday, execute idempotent writes with backups and re-read verification, remove stale operational Supabase rows, mark absent Monday items resolved, and rebuild n8n Data Table caches by archiving the old cache and creating a fresh version when in-place refresh is not supported.
